title: CIIVURR Christmas Dog Squeaky Toys with Crinkle, Xmas Interactive Plush Dog Toys, Dog Enrichment Chew Toys to Keep Them Busy, Dog Toys for Small Medium Large Dogs, Puppy Toys - Deer
features: [Deer Dog Toys with Santa Hat] These adorable deer-shaped dog toys with Santa hats in brown and red colors will captivate your dog's interest and keep them entertained. Made with premium plush material, they are soft, lightweight, and perfect for tug and fetch games. Easy for pets to carry, toss, and roll around with, they are great gifts for puppies, small, medium, and large dogs.

[Squeaky with Crinkle & Dog Toys] These deer-shaped interactive dog toys have built-in squeakers that stimulate your pet's passion by making sounds when pressed. With built-in crinkle in the ear, they are great toys to interact with your dog, help them get more exercise, and reduce anxiety and boredom.

[Unique Design & Teething Cleaning] Measuring 27cm x 28cm x 17cm (10.62in x 11.02in x 6.69in), these toys have unique Christmas elements in the hands, ears, and feet section that help clean your dog's teeth. No need to worry about your dog's dental health with these great toys for small, medium, and large dogs.

[Tough Plush Dog Toys] Made with premium plush material, these dog toys are durable and can withstand stretching and biting without breaking easily. They also work as a dog's toothbrush, with the surface fuzz rubbing against the puppy's teeth to wipe off stains and leave no bad smells in their mouth. Keep your puppy clean and healthy by letting them bite on these toys more.

[TIPS] These chew toys are machine washable and easy to clean. Not recommended for aggressive heavy chewers of more than 70 lbs. Always keep an eye on your dog when they are playing with toys to ensure their safety, as there is no such thing as a 100% indestructible dog toy
